title: AST Motor Vehicle Accident: Glennallen [AK25065951]
summary: On 7/6/2025 at approximately 1729 hours, the Alaska State Troopers received a call of a motor vehicle collision near mile marker 189 of the Glenn Highway. AST responded to the scene. Both drivers exchanged information, and no injuries were reported.
sourceAttribution: Multiple Sources (2 reports)

title: AST Traffic Hazard: Glennallen [AK25065913]
summary: On 7/06/2025 at approximately 1514 hours, the Alaska State Troopers received a report of a plane landing on the Richardson Highway near mile marker 121. After the investigation, it was determined that the plane had run out of fuel and made a safe landing on the highway. After refueling, several Village Public Safety Officers (VPSO) shut down the Richardson Highway, and the plane safely departed. AST would like to thank the VPSOs for assisting with this incident.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: the Richardson Highway near mile marker 121

incident_type: Assault IV, VCOR, MIW IV, Reckless Endangerment
summary: On 07/06/2025, at approximately 1400 hours, AST contacted Megan McDonald in Houston. Megan had multiple outstanding arrest warrants. title: AST Assault in the 4th degree: Wasilla [AK25065815]
summary: On July 7, 2025, at approximately 0700 hours, the Alaska State Troopers received a 911 phone call alleging an assault in Wasilla. AST responded, and an investigation revealed that Emma Thielen 28y had assaulted a household member. Emma Thielen was arrested for Assault in the 4th degree (a)(1) (DV) a...

title: AST Drift Gillnet Buoy with ADFG Number Required: Dillingham [AK25063736]
incident_type: Drift Gillnet Buoy with ADFG Number Required
summary: On June 30, 2025 Samuil Reutov age 29 from Homer was cited by Alaska Wildlife Troopers during Bristol Bay Salmon Enforcement Program for missing the required labeled buoys on each end of drift gill net. Arraignment is set for August 4, 2025 at the Dillingham District Court.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
topic: Drift Gillnet Buoy with ADFG Number Required

entities.address_detail: the Dillingham District Court
